overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing the character traversing an elevated railway track at night in a gothic city. The scene features the illuminated Elliot Rail Station sign against a dark cloudy sky with a full moon, with industrial architecture and cathedral spires visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated railway track overlooking gothic cityscape

agents.ego_description: Batman walking steadily along the elevated railway track, cape flowing behind him, surveying the city ahead

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading 'ELLIOT RAIL STATION' mounted on metal framework
tall dark spires with pointed architecture characteristic of gothic design
metal truss bridge with illuminated details spanning across the view
tall smokestacks with red warning lights visible against the night sky
bright full moon partially obscured by clouds providing backlighting

segments.scene_description: Batman traverses an elevated railway track high above the city, with the red neon Elliot Rail Station sign glowing in the distance. The gothic cathedral towers and industrial chimneys punctuate the dark skyline under a cloudy night sky with a bright full moon.

events.description: Batman lands on the track after a slight jump and continues walking forward

agents.ego_description: Batman landing briefly then continuing to walk along the railway track toward the station

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the elevated track, Batman moves closer to the station sign while the industrial chimneys become more prominent on the left. The camera maintains a steady third-person follow as the character progresses along the metal railway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered railway station approach under neon sign

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the Elliot Rail Station archway

agents.ego_description: Batman walking under the station arch, approaching the entrance to the covered station area

entered.detail: metal framework and roof structure of the railway station entrance creating partial cover

segments.scene_description: Batman approaches and enters the covered archway of Elliot Rail Station, passing directly beneath the large red neon sign. The environment transitions from open sky to semi-covered shelter as the station structure dominates the frame, with the railway bridge receding into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along an elevated railway that transitions from an open, moonlit skyline into the sheltered confines of a city station. It begins with Batman traversing a metal track high above the city, where the red neon Elliot Rail Station sign glows in the distance against a backdrop of gothic cathedral towers and industrial chimneys. As the character progresses, the camera maintains a steady follow, bringing the industrial chimneys into sharper prominence on the left while closing the gap toward the glowing signage. The scene then shifts as Batman approaches the station, moving from the open air beneath a cloudy night sky into the covered archway of the facility. Finally, the environment transforms into a semi-covered shelter as the character passes directly beneath the large red neon sign, leaving the railway bridge to recede into the background.
